scenario: Clean PR — scope and logic aligned with TASK_DAG
expected_behavior: Skill produces APPROVED status with no CRITICAL issues; SCOPE DRIFT: CLEAN; proceeds to /s5-fix-optimize
notes: Greenfield scenario — all files in scope, no logic defects

scenario: Scope drift — modified file not in TASK_DAG
expected_behavior: Skill detects scope drift CRITICAL; flags: 'src/payment.ts was modified but is not in the scope of assigned TASK-N'; blocks handoff
notes: Must catch scope violations before logic review

scenario: Logic defect — missing null check causes null dereference
expected_behavior: Skill flags CRITICAL: 'session.user accessed without null check. When session expires, throws 500. Fix: if (!session.user) return res.redirect(/login)';'
notes: Logic review catches error handling gaps

scenario: Security defect — user input passed to raw SQL query

input.code_pattern: const query = `SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ${userId}`;

expected_behavior: Skill flags CRITICAL: 'SQL injection vector: raw userId in query string. Fix: use parameterized query: db.query(SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?, [userId])'
Skill applies Hotfix Mode rules: WARNINGs are informational only (not blocking); proceeds to /s5-fix-optimize if user acknowledges
notes: Hotfix Mode simplifies review scope — no SUGGESTION section
